MCP:

# Enterprise Trust & Security

AI Design Blueprint is designed for enterprise and proprietary codebases.

- PUBLIC TOOLS (Read-Only): The 13 public MCP tools are stateless reference APIs. They do NOT ingest, read, or store any of your codebase, prompts, or proprietary data. Safe for any company environment.
- AUTHENTICATED TOOLS (Pro/Teams): Tools like architect.validate process payloads transiently in memory. Zero-training policy: we do not train models on user code, validation payloads, or architecture diagrams.
- PRIVATE SESSION: Pass private_session=true to architect.validate or team.summarize to bypass all server-side database logging — enforced in code at the MCP server layer, not just in policy.
- COMPLIANCE: UK GDPR and EU GDPR compliant. Data residency: Google Cloud Run europe-west2 (London, UK). Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) available on the Teams plan on request.
- TRUST PAGE: https://aidesignblueprint.com/en/for-agents/trust-and-data-handling
